headline: Is IQVIA (IQV) Offering An Opportunity After Recent Share Price Declines?
summary: If you are wondering whether IQVIA Holdings is attractively priced right now, it helps to separate the recent share price swings from what the business might actually be worth. The stock last closed at US$173.96, with returns of 5.5% over the past 7 days, a 24.4% decline over 30 days, a 22.8% decline year to date, a 5.2% decline over 1 year, an 18.2% decline over 3 years and an 8.1% decline over 5 years, which may have shifted how investors see its potential and risk.
